market_pulse: Major Breakaway Music Festival weekend activation across Strip mega-venues; competitive DJ roster (Tiësto, Fisher, Chris Lake) commanding high engagement, while LIV maintains steady event velocity with Metro Boomin and John Summit recent bookings.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Breakaway Music Festival spanning Thu-Sun (XS, Encore, OMNIA hosting major stages)
Major Lazer (Diplo) headline at Encore Beach Club tonight (June 14)
DJ Snake confirmed for multiple TAO properties
Wax Motif return to Zouk post-EDC energy
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: MAXIMIZE social amplification: EDC Week residuals + Festival proximity = peak discovery window. Push weekend-specific content (pool, VIP, talent announcements). Consider counter-programming vs festival flow or capitalize on festival-adjacent crowds.

content_gaps.description: XS, OMNIA, Encore dominating Breakaway integration; minimal TikTok story/reel content from LIV counter-narrative or 'skip festival, party with us' positioning
content_gaps.suggested_action: Publish 3-5 'Festival Fatigue Recovery' Stories on LIV socials: VIP cabana recaps, exclusive talent meet-ups, non-EDM alternative experiences

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Zouk, Hakkasan, TAO) leveraging guest list creators and TikTok personalities more aggressively for UGC; LIV has lower creator mention velocity
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch 'LIV Takeover Tuesday/Thursday' featuring rotating TikTok creators (500K+ followers); tag in stories and reels. Target @globeth0tter ecosystem.

content_gaps.description: Palm Tree Beach Club and TAO Beach running carousel reels (4-8 post sequences); LIV Beach missing sequential storytelling format in UGC compilations
content_gaps.suggested_action: Convert pool/dayclub content to 5-post carousels: arrivals → cabanas → talent moments → sunset VIP → send-off vibes

influencer_activity.mention: Featured in Vegas promoter content ecosystem; multiple LIV-tagged outfit/vibe posts; driving traffic to guest lists via @Vegas Promoter Jacob collaboration
